%%        _                                   
%%       | |                                  
%%       | | __ _ _ __   ___  _ __   ___  ___ 
%%   _   | |/ _` | '_ \ / _ \| '_ \ / _ \/ __|
%%  | |__| | (_| | |_) | (_) | | | |  __/\__ \
%%   \____/ \__,_| .__/ \___/|_| |_|\___||___/
%%               | |                          
%%               |_|                          

Name:路加素(rukasu)田中竜也

= Index =
== Main Texts ==

== Outros ==

https://www.tofugu.com/japanese-grammar/ - Gramatica
https://a2.marugotoweb.jp/en/kanji/ - Marugoto e exercicio
